entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. being studied for disease resistance

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A devastating disease affecting over 350 plant species, including peanut

entities.name: RALSTONIA SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The pathogen that causes bacterial wilt

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of certain peanut cultivars to resist bacterial wilt

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using diagnostic markers to accelerate the development of resistant cultivars

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to identify and select for specific traits like BWR

entities.name: QTL-SEQ
entities.description: A sequencing-based trait mapping approach used to discover genomic regions and markers

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B02
entities.description: The specific chromosome in peanut where the genomic region associated with BWR was identified

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used to narrow down the genomic region

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Putative genes within the identified genomic region that may contribute to BWR

entities.name: R-GENES
entities.description: Putative resistance genes among the candidate genes
